hero.subtitle: SHIPPING PLANS
hero.title: Flexible Shipping Solutions for Every Need
hero.description: Choose from our range of shipping plans designed for individuals, businesses, and enterprises. Transparent pricing with no hidden fees, just reliable logistics solutions.

plans.name: Standard Shipping
plans.description: Essential shipping services for individuals and small businesses

plans.name: Business Shipping
plans.description: Complete shipping solution for growing businesses

plans.name: Enterprise Solutions
plans.description: Custom logistics solutions for large operations

faqs.question: Are there any additional fees?
faqs.answer: Our plans include standard shipping services with transparent pricing. Additional services like expedited shipping, special handling, or oversized items may incur extra charges that will be clearly communicated before shipping.

faqs.question: How do I track my shipments?
faqs.answer: All plans include our standard tracking system accessible through your dashboard. Business and Enterprise plans include enhanced real-time tracking with SMS notifications and detailed delivery information.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my plan as my business grows?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade your shipping plan at any time. Your new benefits will be available immediately, and billing will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH transfers, and wire transfers for Enterprise accounts. We also offer net-30 terms for qualified business customers.

cta.title: Need a Custom Shipping Solution?
cta.description: Our shipping experts can create a tailored plan that perfectly fits your logistics requirements.
